cards.prompt: explicit IGreet.Hello() + public Hello(): e.Hello() (class) и i.Hello() (interface)?
cards.code: using System; interface IGreet { string Hello(); } class En : IGreet { string IGreet.Hello() => "Hi"; public string Hello() => "class-Hi"; } var e = new En(); IGreet i = e; Console.WriteLine($"{e.Hello()} {i.Hello()}");

cards.prompt: DIM: interface с Rest() default, class Bee только Work(); w.Work(); w.Rest()?
cards.code: using System; interface IWorker { void Work(); void Rest() => Console.WriteLine("resting (default)"); } class Bee : IWorker { public void Work() => Console.WriteLine("working"); } IWorker w = new Bee(); w.Work(); w.Rest();

cards.prompt: два интерфейса IA/IB с Id(); explicit A и B: (IA)c.Id() и (IB)c.Id()?
cards.code: using System; interface IA { string Id(); } interface IB { string Id(); } class C : IA, IB { string IA.Id() => "A"; string IB.Id() => "B"; } var c = new C(); Console.WriteLine($"{((IA)c).Id()} {((IB)c).Id()}");
